actions.name: Perfectionist
actions.description: Effect: The user's Attacks with <60 base Power gain @Trait[crit-1], and those with <40 default Power also gain @Trait[priority-20]. This effect applies to @Trait[x-strike] Attacks. When the user would miss an Attack, they gain @Affliction[delay 30].

system.description: Effect: The user's Attacks with <60 base Power gain @Trait[crit-1], and those with <40 default Power also gain @Trait[priority-20]. This effect applies to @Trait[x-strike] Attacks. When the user would miss an Attack, they gain @Affliction[delay 30].
